system.notes:
Japanese TAV-12 spaceplane, slightly smaller than the Hermes/Aries designs.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.32): TAV-12 · 220 · 3 · 4 · Chemical · 8 · Batteries, Fuel Cell · 50% · 3 · 30m3 · 3 · 40 · 0 · 7 · 3 · None

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 220 million eb; Crew 3; Passengers 4; Drive Type Chemical; Burn Elements 8; Power Type Batteries, Fuel Cell; Sensors 50%; Computers 3; Cargo 30m3; Actions 3; Weapon Spaces 40; Armor (max SP) 0; Damage Points 7; Overkill Points 3; Shuttlecraft None.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.
